description_long: This apartment building features a prominent, multi-faceted hip roof with gray shingles and a central chimney. The facade is symmetrical, with a covered entryway supported by columns and large windows on either side, providing ample natural light. The structure is elevated on stilts, with a wraparound porch and visible balconies on the sides, enhancing outdoor living space. The building sits on a green, landscaped base, with retaining walls and steps leading up to the main entrance. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, contrasted by dark blue trim and railings. The overall design is modern yet functional, with clear attention to symmetry and outdoor accessibility.
description: A modern, symmetrical apartment building with a hip roof, large windows, balconies, and a covered entryway, elevated on stilts and surrounded by landscaped green areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with columns, large windows, and the central hip roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wraparound porch, balcony, and green retaining wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, additional windows, and landscaped base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with another balcony, porch, and visible support stilts.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in pairs and groups, evenly spaced across the facade and sides, with alignment both vertically and horizontally.
